sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n104395" key="tornwto/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τορν-ωτός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n104395.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">rounded with the</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τόρνος,</foreign> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">turned,</tr_> Hdn.Gr.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0084.tlg001:1:221" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.221</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
